name: get docs and paste on google sheets

Pitch email.subject: Tiger Recruitment Mobile
Pitch email.body:
Hi Ruth,

I pulled up tiger-recruitment.com on mobile and the 'View All Jobs' button is buried inside a horizontal scroll in the jobs section — a candidate trying to find open roles can't complete the one action that matters.

Would you like me to send the prototype I made for you?

Best,
Senul

Follow up 1.subject: Tiger Jobs Section
Follow up 1.body:
Hi Ruth,

A candidate landing on tiger-recruitment.com on their phone to look at roles never finds the 'View All Jobs' button — it's hidden inside a scroll they don't know exists.

Want me to send it over?

Best,
Senul

Follow up 2.subject: Tiger Recruitment Prototype
Follow up 2.body:
Hi Ruth,

Would you like me to send over the prototype for Tiger Recruitment?

Best,
Senul

Follow up 3.subject: Send the prototype over?
Follow up 3.body:
Yes or no — want me to send the prototype over?

Best,
Senul

Pitch email.body:
Hi Katie,

I pulled up kindredrecruitment.com on mobile and the header has 'Call now', 'Need to hire?' and a hamburger menu all competing for attention — a candidate landing on your site doesn't know where to look or what to tap first.

Would you like me to send the prototype I made for you?

Best,
Senul
